body:
- Implemented BackgroundGradientAnimation component for dynamic gradient effects.
- Added CSS styles for the waitlist page, including custom cursor, noise overlay, gradient blobs, and responsive design.
- Enhanced layout and animations for various UI elements to improve user experience.
